response.justification: Over a decade of full-stack experience with recent TypeScript/Node.js work at re:cinq and Optilyz, plus active involvement in AI-agent infrastructure (MCP) directly aligns with the role's primary stack and AI agent requirement. Demonstrated breadth across frontend, backend, mobile, and DevOps, with a strong testing/craftsmanship orientation (TDD, CI/CD, workshops).
strengths: Recent hands-on TypeScript/Node.js plus AI-agent/MCP work matches primary stack
Long track record of full-stack delivery with React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker
Strong testing and engineering craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, workshops)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed
Kotlin not mentioned; Java exposure is older
Some stack emphasis on DLang may not transfer directly

key_factors.factor: Senior full-stack experience with matching stack
